title: Dungeons n' Such
description: A simple fantasy modpack to play with your friends
body:
Immerse yourself in a handcrafted world where the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft meets the enchantment of carefully curated mods!

Complete with Better Combat, Exploration, Leveling, Races, and Harder Survivability to fully enrich you into Dungeons n' Such. Since the modpack is in it's early stages it will be receiving constant updates hopefully every week, also this modpack is meant to be played with friends or on a server.

Have fun!

credits to Dig's DnD Origins! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/digs-dnd-origins
